Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 4.7 cm x 2.1 cm x 2.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 37% slough, 63% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Debridement consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Diabetic to Left foot / Measures 4.7 cm x 2.1 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
